message:
refactor: cross-cutting refinements to API, connector, security, runtime, policy, and VEF subsystems

API Layer (8 files, +180/-30):
- fleet_control_routes.rs: Enhanced fleet management endpoint logic (+27)
- fleet_quarantine.rs: Expanded quarantine policy handling (+23)
- middleware.rs: Request pipeline authentication refinements (+23)
- mod.rs: Module restructuring with new route registrations (+35)
- session_auth.rs: Token rotation and validation hardening (+11)
- verifier_routes.rs: Verifier API endpoint improvements (+29)
- compat_gate.rs, service.rs: Minor compatibility and service wiring updates

Connector (11 files, +140/-30):
- operator_intelligence.rs: Major expansion of operator insight aggregation (+89)
- claim_compiler.rs: Claim compilation pipeline enhancements (+41)
- bocpd.rs, cancel_injection_gate.rs, eviction_saga.rs, lease_conflict.rs,
  region_ownership.rs, transport_fault_gate.rs, trust_fabric.rs: Incremental
  refinements to consensus and fault handling

Security (8 files, +50/-10):
- interface_hash.rs: Interface hashing logic expansion (+25)
- isolation_rail_router.rs: Continued rail model adjustments (+7)
- zk_attestation.rs: Attestation vector refresh (+9)
- copilot_engine.rs, dgis/barrier_primitives.rs, dgis/update_copilot.rs,
  trust_complexity.rs, vef_degraded_mode.rs: Minor refinements

Runtime (4 files, +100/-15):
- optimization_governor.rs: Safety envelope expansion with new knob types (+87)
- anti_entropy.rs, checkpoint.rs, hardware_planner.rs: Incremental updates

Policy (5 files, +15/-10):
- compatibility_gate.rs, decision_engine.rs, evidence_emission.rs,
  guardrail_monitor.rs, policy_explainer.rs: Policy evaluation refinements

VEF (2 files, +20/-5):
- proof_generator.rs: Proof generation pipeline improvements (+12)
- verification_state.rs: State machine transition enhancements (+7)

Also: registry/staking_governance.rs (+24), sdk/verifier_sdk.rs,
control_plane/(control_lane_policy, divergence_gate), federation/atc_participation_weighting,
storage/retrievability_gate, supply_chain/artifact_signing, testing/lab_runtime,
tools/profile_tuning_harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
